description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses node:latest as the default Docker image and caches the node_modules directory. Add a build stage with a build-project job that runs on the node:8 image, installs git via apt-get, installs bower and grunt-cli globally with npm, runs npm install, runs bower install --allow-root, executes grunt test, sends coverage to Codacy with find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN, and runs grunt release; the job archives the coverage/, doc/ and dist/ directories as artifacts that expire in one day and records coverage using the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. Add a deploy stage with a pages job that depends on build-project, runs only on the master branch, executes ls -l, creates a .public directory, moves coverage/ and doc/ into .public, renames .public to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact that expires in ninety days.
